Start your heading structure with h1

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading heading--2 sc-1cef85c1-0 eTjKLP"><button aria-controls="Våre arbeidsområder" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne Våre arbeidsområder" class="toggle-button" type="button"><span>Vå
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Mediehenvendelse?</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="sc-257f7e97-2 idaqPY" href="#main-content">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'ffo logo - lenke til forside'

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'ffo logo - lenke til forside'

<a aria-label="ffo logo - lenke til forside" class="footer-logo" href="/"><svg class="icon sc-64065f3e-0 cOLVAr" fill="none" height="190" viewbox="0 0 426 190" width="426" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/200
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=Mariboes gate 13, 0183 Oslo" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank">Mariboes gate 13, 0183 Oslo</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading heading--2 sc-1cef85c1-0 eTjKLP"><button aria-controls="Våre arbeidsområder" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne Våre arbeidsområder" class="toggle-button" type="button"><span>Vå
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3><strong>Innledning</strong></h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading heading--2 sc-1cef85c1-0 eTjKLP"><button aria-controls="Våre arbeidsområder" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne Våre arbeidsområder" class="toggle-button" type="button"><span>Vå
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="sc-257f7e97-2 idaqPY" href="#main-content">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'ffo logo - lenke til forside'

<a aria-label="ffo logo - lenke til forside" href="/"><svg class="icon sc-64065f3e-0 cOLVAr ffo-logo" fill="none" height="190" viewbox="0 0 426 190" width="426" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g c
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'ffo logo - lenke til forside'

<a aria-label="ffo logo - lenke til forside" class="footer-logo" href="/"><svg class="icon sc-64065f3e-0 cOLVAr" fill="none" height="190" viewbox="0 0 426 190" width="426" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/200
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=Mariboes gate 13, 0183 Oslo" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank">Mariboes gate 13, 0183 Oslo</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading heading--2 sc-1cef85c1-0 eTjKLP"><button aria-controls="Våre arbeidsområder" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne Våre arbeidsområder" class="toggle-button" type="button"><span>Vå
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="sc-257f7e97-2 idaqPY" href="#main-content">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'ffo logo - lenke til forside'

<a aria-label="ffo logo - lenke til forside" href="/"><svg class="icon sc-64065f3e-0 cOLVAr ffo-logo" fill="none" height="190" viewbox="0 0 426 190" width="426" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g c
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'ffo logo - lenke til forside'

<a aria-label="ffo logo - lenke til forside" class="footer-logo" href="/"><svg class="icon sc-64065f3e-0 cOLVAr" fill="none" height="190" viewbox="0 0 426 190" width="426" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/200
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=Mariboes gate 13, 0183 Oslo" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank">Mariboes gate 13, 0183 Oslo</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="facebook" href="http://facebook.com/funksjonshemmede" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank"><svg class="icon sc-64065f3e-0 cOLVAr" fill="none" height="22" viewbox="0 0 22 22" width="22" xmln

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

<a href="https://www.sanity.io/" lang="en" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank">Structured content powered by Sanity.io</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="søk" class="search-button" tabindex="-1"><svg class="icon sc-64065f3e-0 cOLVAr" fill="none" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path clip
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'clip0_3682_61896' appears 2 times

id="clip0_3682_61896"
Each ID must be unique on the page

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading heading--2 sc-1cef85c1-0 eTjKLP"><button aria-controls="Våre arbeidsområder" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne Våre arbeidsområder" class="toggle-button" type="button"><span>Vå
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4><strong>Terje André Olsen</strong></h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

First heading is h2, should start with h1

Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Likhetsløftet nå!</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (13 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="sc-257f7e97-2 idaqPY" href="#main-content">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'ffo logo - lenke til forside'

<a aria-label="ffo logo - lenke til forside" href="/"><svg class="icon sc-64065f3e-0 cOLVAr ffo-logo" fill="none" height="190" viewbox="0 0 426 190" width="426" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g c

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading heading--2 sc-1cef85c1-0 eTjKLP"><button aria-controls="Våre arbeidsområder" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne Våre arbeidsområder" class="toggle-button" type="button"><span>Vå
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="sc-257f7e97-2 idaqPY" href="#main-content">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Link text has redundant phrase: 'ffo logo - lenke til forside'

<a aria-label="ffo logo - lenke til forside" href="/"><svg class="icon sc-64065f3e-0 cOLVAr ffo-logo" fill="none" height="190" viewbox="0 0 426 190" width="426" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g c

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading heading--2 sc-1cef85c1-0 eTjKLP"><button aria-controls="Våre arbeidsområder" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne Våre arbeidsområder" class="toggle-button" type="button"><span>Vå
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Arbeidsdeltakelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="sc-257f7e97-2 idaqPY" href="#main-content">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="søk" class="search-button" tabindex="-1"><svg class="icon sc-64065f3e-0 cOLVAr" fill="none" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path clip
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'clip0_3682_61896' appears 2 times

id="clip0_3682_61896"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (47 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

First heading is h2, should start with h1

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (7 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 7 pages]
Avvik: 10 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name (×128 across article pages)

<svg class="icon sc-64065f3e-0 cOLVAr" fill="none" height="16" viewbox="0 0 17 16" width="17" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M15.1782 5.84973L12.5631 8.62588C11.8647 9.27197 11.2967 10.04
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1 (×7 across article pages)

<h2 class="heading heading--2 sc-1cef85c1-0 eTjKLP"><button aria-controls="Våre arbeidsområder" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Åpne Våre arbeidsområder" class="toggle-button" type="button"><span>Vå
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3 (×1 across article pages)

<h3 class="heading heading--3 sc-1cef85c1-0 kgJQYz">Filtrer søk</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold' (×7 across article pages)

<a class="sc-257f7e97-2 idaqPY" href="#main-content">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'ffo logo - lenke til forside' (×14 across article pages)

<a aria-label="ffo logo - lenke til forside" href="/"><svg class="icon sc-64065f3e-0 cOLVAr ffo-logo" fill="none" height="190" viewbox="0 0 426 190" width="426" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g c
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×31 across article pages)

<a href="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=Mariboes gate 13, 0183 Oslo" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank">Mariboes gate 13, 0183 Oslo</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible (×7 across article pages)

<button aria-label="søk" class="search-button" tabindex="-1"><svg class="icon sc-64065f3e-0 cOLVAr" fill="none" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path clip
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible (×50 across article pages)

<input class="input" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'clip0_3682_61896' appears 2 times (×7 across article pages)

id="clip0_3682_61896"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://ffo.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://ffo.no --max-pages 15 --format html
